name: reasonix-orchestrator
description: Codex Desktop Orchestrator workflow skill and plugin packaging for Reasonix Hand execution.

interface.shortDescription: Codex Desktop Brain/Judge plus Reasonix Hand workflow.
interface.longDescription: Adds a reusable Codex Desktop Orchestrator workflow where Codex Desktop acts as Brain and Judge while Reasonix CLI executes code changes as Hand through scripts/ai-hand.ps1.
defaultPrompt: Use $reasonix-orchestrator to install this workflow into the repo.
Use $reasonix-orchestrator to audit AGENTS.md and ai-hand.ps1.
Use $reasonix-orchestrator to package this repo as a reusable workflow skill.
